items.name: Nyan Cat Shoulder Pet
items.description:
Bring the chaotic fun of Meme Simulator Returns right to your shoulder! The NyanCat Shoulder Pet features a tiny floating companion based on one of the characters from the game, always hovering by your side and spreading meme energy wherever you go. Perfect for players who want a cute, vibrant, and iconic partner during their adventures. Let this colorful mini-NyanCat follow you through every map, every roleplay moment, and every meme-filled journey!
